languages.text: "Мы в ловушке, Лария. С реальностью происходит нечто, что заставляет ее вечно повторяться."

traits.locale_text: "Мы в ловушке, Лария. С реальностью происходит нечто, что заставляет ее вечно повторяться."

languages.text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."
languages.original_text: "Мы в ловушке, Лария. С реальностью происходит нечто, что заставляет ее вечно повторяться."

traits.locale_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."
"We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."
"We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

languages.text: “我们被困住了，菈丽雅。现实正在发生某种变化，它在不断自我重复。”
languages.original_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

traits.locale_text: “我们被困住了，菈丽雅。现实正在发生某种变化，它在不断自我重复。”

languages.text: « Nous sommes pris au piège, Laria. Quelqu'un manipule la réalité de manière à ce qu'elle se répète encore et encore. »
languages.original_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

traits.locale_text: « Nous sommes pris au piège, Laria. Quelqu'un manipule la réalité de manière à ce qu'elle se répète encore et encore. »

languages.text: "Bir tuzağın içindeyiz Laria. Gerçekliğe nüfuz eden bir şey var, onun sonsuza dek tekrar etmesine sebep olan bir şey."
languages.original_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

traits.locale_text: "Bir tuzağın içindeyiz Laria. Gerçekliğe nüfuz eden bir şey var, onun sonsuza dek tekrar etmesine sebep olan bir şey."

languages.text: «Esto es una trampa, Laria. Algo está haciendo que la realidad se repita infinitamente».
languages.original_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

traits.locale_text: «Esto es una trampa, Laria. Algo está haciendo que la realidad se repita infinitamente».

languages.text: "Wir sitzen in einer Falle, Laria. Irgendetwas bringt die Realität dazu, sich ständig aufs Neue zu wiederholen."
languages.original_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sitzen in einer Falle, Laria. Irgendetwas bringt die Realität dazu, sich ständig aufs Neue zu wiederholen."

languages.text: 「私たちは罠に落ちている、ラリア。現実が繰り返される原因になっている何かが起こっているんだ。」
languages.original_text: "We are in a trap, Laria. Something is happening to reality that is causing it to repeat itself forever."

traits.locale_text: 「私たちは罠に落ちている、ラリア。現実が繰り返される原因になっている何かが起こっているんだ。」
